result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred
  WHERE closeddate >= createddate
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
       AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM handle_times
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred
  WHERE closeddate >= createddate
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
       AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM handle_times
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred
  WHERE closeddate >= createddate
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
       AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM handle_times
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred
  WHERE closed_ts >= created_ts
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id
FROM handle_times
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY AVG(handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred
  WHERE closed_ts >= created_ts
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id
FROM handle_times
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY AVG(handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;
